name: Higelyges Chadros
description:
__Height:__ 691 cm (22'8½")
__Affiliation:__ Leader of the Centaur Patrol Unit
__Bounty:__ ~!80,060,000!~

  ~!After Whitebeard's death he went off and took control of Foodvalten, one of the New World islands formerly under his protection. He is later defeat at the hands of Basil Hawkins, he quit being a pirate and resided on Punk Hazard, where he became the boss of the Centaur Patrol Unit which guarded part of the island!~
